channel.title: Abnormal Security Threat Intel Blog (Custom Feed)

item.title: Cybersecurity Skills Gap: How Security Leaders Adapt
item.description: Discover how security leaders are closing the cybersecurity skills gap through role restructuring, internal development, and AI-driven automation.

item.title: Email Fraud Wire Transfer Attacks: A Prevention Framework
item.description: Learn how email fraud wire transfer attacks bypass traditional security and discover a layered prevention framework to protect your organization.

item.title: Cloud Threat Prevention: Detection Methods Explained
item.description: Discover how cloud threat prevention stops email-borne attacks targeting your infrastructure. Learn behavioral AI strategies to detect account takeover and BEC.

item.title: AI Cybersecurity Threats in 2026 and the Rise of Behavioral Detection
item.description: Explore how AI cybersecurity threats bypass traditional defenses and why behavioral AI catches attacks that SEG misses.

item.title: Awareness to Action: AI Powers the Shift to Human Risk Management
item.description: Security awareness training is shifting from generic compliance to measurable human risk management. Abnormal AI's Field CISO explains how AI drives real behavior change across the organization.

item.title: Types of Email Scams Targeting Enterprises in 2026
item.description: Discover the types of email scams targeting enterprises—BEC, VEC, and account takeover—and how behavioral AI detects attacks without malicious payloads.

item.title: From Operator to Builder: Why Stephen Harrison Joined Abnormal to Shape the Next Generation of Security
item.description: Abnormal welcomes Stephen Harrison as VP of Product, Next Gen Products, to expand its behavioral AI security platform and accelerate AI-native innovation.

item.title: The New Pivot: Attackers Move from Inbox to Microsoft Teams
item.description: Attackers increasingly pivot from email into Microsoft Teams using trusted identities. Learn how multi-channel attacks work and why Teams has become a prime target.

item.title: How to Detect and Prevent Corporate Espionage Attacks
item.description: Learn how corporate espionage exploits email to steal trade secrets and IP. Discover behavioral AI detection methods that catch what legacy tools miss.

item.title: 9 Pretexting Scams Targeting Executives and How to Stop Them
item.description: Explore pretexting scams targeting C-suite executives with real-world examples. Learn why text-based attacks bypass legacy security and how behavioral AI detects them.

item.title: Types of Vendor Fraud Targeting AP Teams
item.description: Learn the types of vendor fraud targeting accounts payable teams and how behavioral AI detects email-based attacks that bypass traditional security controls.

item.title: The Importance of Cybersecurity in Healthcare for Patient Safety
item.description: The importance of cybersecurity in healthcare goes beyond compliance. Learn why cyber defense is patient defense and how security leaders can protect care delivery.

item.title: Healthcare Fraud and Cybersecurity: Stopping BEC and Invoice Fraud
item.description: Healthcare fraud and cybersecurity intersect at BEC, invoice fraud, and identity compromise. Learn how behavioral AI detects financial attacks others miss.

item.title: Healthcare Cybersecurity Best Practices by Maturity Level
item.description: Healthcare cybersecurity best practices scaled by maturity level. Learn foundational, intermediate, and advanced controls to protect patient data.

item.title: Cybersecurity Attacks in Healthcare: How Threat Actors Strike
item.description: Cybersecurity attacks in healthcare are escalating through identity compromise and supply chain exploitation. Learn how security leaders are fighting back.

item.title: Three Years of Abnormal + CrowdStrike: Advancing AI-Driven Protection Across Email, Identity, and Endpoint
item.description: Abnormal and CrowdStrike celebrate three years of partnership, unifying AI-based email security, identity, endpoint, and SIEM to detect and stop sophisticated attacks faster.

item.title: User and Entity Behavior Analytics vs Traditional Security
item.description: User and Entity Behavior Analytics (UEBA) detects credential attacks and insider threats traditional tools miss. Learn why behavioral security wins.

item.title: How Security Frameworks Prevent Phishing Attacks
item.description: Security frameworks prevent phishing through training, email controls, and incident response. Learn how NIST and CIS Controls reduce risk.

item.title: Identity Protection Strategies for the Modern Enterprise
item.description: Identity protection strategies for modern enterprises. Learn MFA, behavioral monitoring, vendor verification, and phishing prevention tactics.

item.title: Human Risk Management: Building a Data-Driven Program
item.description: Build a data-driven human risk management program using AI-powered simulations, just-in-time coaching, and real attack intelligence.

item.title: Managed Cybersecurity Services: Which Type Fits Your Business?
item.description: Managed cybersecurity services deliver 24/7 threat detection without in-house SOC overhead. Learn which type fits your needs and how to evaluate providers.

item.title: AI Security Awareness Training: Implementation Guide
item.description: Implement AI security awareness training with this 6-phase framework to deliver personalized simulations and reduce human risk.

item.title: CFO Phishing: 7 Ways to Protect Finance Executives
item.description: Discover why CFO phishing targets finance executives and learn seven proven strategies to defend your organization against wire transfer fraud.

item.title: Role-Based Phishing: How Attackers Target Job Functions
item.description: Learn how role-based phishing targets specific job functions and discover defense strategies that match how attackers select and exploit their victims.

item.title: Invoice Redirection Fraud: How to Build Detection Systems
item.description: Discover how invoice redirection fraud exploits vendor trust and learn to build detection systems that catch payment diversions before funds move.

item.title: Targeted Phishing Defense: Stop Spear Phishing at Scale
item.description: Learn how targeted phishing attacks use AI-powered reconnaissance and discover scalable defenses combining behavioral analytics with real-threat training.

item.title: What Is the Weakest Link in Cybersecurity?
item.description: Discover what is the weakest link in cybersecurity and why fixing systems, not blaming users, is the key to reducing human risk.

item.title: Tech Consolidation Strategy: Consolidate vs. Specialize
item.description: Learn when tech consolidation strengthens security and when specialization is smarter with this risk-based decision framework for security teams.

item.title: Vendor Security Evaluation: Framework and Best Practices
item.description: Build a scalable vendor security evaluation program with tiered frameworks, assessment tools, and continuous monitoring best practices.

item.title: Email Authentication Setup to Prevent Spoofing Guide
item.description: Follow this enterprise roadmap for email authentication setup to prevent spoofing with phased SPF, DKIM, and DMARC deployment.
